review_text: A breathtaking space epic with stunning visuals and a captivating story. The plot twists kept me on the edge of my seat!
A slow burn horror that relies more on atmosphere than jump scares. Some scenes were a bit too dark, but overall a decent watch.
Disappointing sequel. The acting was wooden and the plot was predictable. I expected more from this franchise.
An absolute riot! The comedic timing was perfect and the mystery was genuinely engaging. Highly recommend for a good laugh.
Visually spectacular, but the story felt a bit convoluted. It had some interesting ideas, but didn't quite stick the landing.
